helpful: The provisioned documents (petition text) were highly useful for determining the exact split alleged and the quality of the vehicle.
The base rates in the statpack are essential for grounding the probability.
gaps: The corpus query service was unreachable from the runner environment when I attempted to use `uv run fedcourts query` without `local` or `ranged`, and `ranged` failed due to missing env var, while `local` failed due to no local DB.
notes: Relied on MCP for legal context instead of corpus query.
